Get Started Free

The Ferni Fund

Free for everyone.
Always.

No tiers. No catches. The full team, unlimited time, complete memory. Everyone deserves support.

Everyone gets everything

Full team. Unlimited time. Complete memory. No exceptions.

Some choose to give

Those who can, gift forward. Not for features—for others.

Everyone benefits

Your gift keeps Ferni free for someone who needs it.

Why free for everyone?

We believe everyone deserves access to quality support—not just those who can afford it. Mental health coaching shouldn't be a luxury.

The Ferni Fund works like a community: those who can contribute help keep Ferni accessible for everyone. No judgment if you can't. You're still welcome here.

This isn't charity. It's how we believe support should work.

Gift Forward

Choose how you'd like to support the community.

Ferni is free because someone believed you deserved support. If you can, gift that forward.

Your Privacy

Your conversations stay yours

We built Ferni with privacy at its core. Your data is never sold or shared.

End-to-End Encrypted

Your conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest.

You Own Your Data

Export or delete your data anytime with one click.

Never Sell Data

Your information is never shared with advertisers.

GDPR & CCPA

We follow the strictest privacy regulations.

Common Questions

Is Ferni really free?
Yes! Ferni is completely free to use. You get access to the full team, unlimited conversations, and complete memory—no catches. Those who can afford to gift forward help keep it that way for everyone.
What do I get for gifting forward?
Nothing extra—and that's the point. Gifting forward isn't about getting more features. It's about making sure others have access to the same support you do. You'll receive a small badge of appreciation, but the real reward is knowing you're helping others.
Can I cancel my gift anytime?
Absolutely. No contracts, no commitment. Cancel with one click. Your access to Ferni continues unchanged—we just hope you'll return when you can.
How is this sustainable?
Our costs are kept low through efficient technology. We're not building a billion-dollar company—we're building something that helps people. The community-supported model means those who can help, do. And it works.

Ready to start?

Whether you gift forward or not, Ferni is here for you.

Start Free Call (484) 481-3081

Ready when you are.

No pressure. No pitch. Just a conversation.
